commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=47265b969a0e010afb6f1f78b0fd34af4492340c)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds default `--no-usage-statistics`, routes Chrome MCP session closes through an owned process-tree cleanup helper, and adds a mocked regression for Linux-style child-first termination.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main still routes Chrome MCP teardown through `client.close()`, while the MCP SDK only owns the direct stdio child and Chrome DevTools MCP can create a detached watchdog. I did not run a live multi-hour process-count reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the PR still needs contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer-visible cleanup fix before merge.

target.title: Clean up browser MCP subprocess tree
target.body:
Fixes #85721.

Summary:
- disable chrome-devtools-mcp usage statistics by default to avoid the telemetry helper path
- route all browser MCP teardown through an owned-process cleanup helper
- collect and terminate child subprocesses before/after client close so detached helpers cannot accumulate

Validation:
- /Users/andy/openclaw/openclaw-85521/node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --write --threads=1 extensions/browser/src/browser/chrome-mcp.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/chrome-mcp.test.ts
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/browser/src/browser/chrome-mcp.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/server-context.existing-session.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/server-context.stop-running-browser.test.ts extensions/browser/src/browser/routes/basic.existing-session.test.ts (4 files, 51 tests passed)
- node scripts/check-changed.mjs --base upstream/main

Note: node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --repo openclaw/openclaw --shell -- "pnpm check:changed" failed before invoking the repo because the local crabbox binary did not pass its basic --version/--help sanity checks, so I ran the same changed-check locally against upstream/main.

Please preserve author attribution if this PR is squashed/reworked, or include:
Co-authored-by: Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com>
target.author: turbotheturtle
